mapper.select: SELECT id, 'requirement' AS type, title, project_id AS projectId, (SELECT project_name FROM project WHERE id = project_id) AS projectName, status, CASE priority WHEN 1 THEN '最高' WHEN 2 THEN '高' WHEN 3 THEN '中' WHEN 4 THEN '低' ELSE '中' END AS priority, assignee_id AS assigneeId, (SELECT real_name FROM user WHERE id = assignee_id) AS assigneeName, create_time AS createTime FROM requirement WHERE assignee_id = #{userId} AND status IN ('待处理', '处理中') UNION ALL SELECT id, 'defect' AS type, title, project_id AS projectId, (SELECT project_name FROM project WHERE id = project_id) AS projectName, status, priority, assignee_id AS assigneeId, (SELECT real_name FROM user WHERE id = assignee_id) AS assigneeName, create_time AS createTime FROM defect WHERE assignee_id = #{userId} AND status IN ('新建', '已指派', '修复中') ORDER BY createTime DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT id FROM requirement WHERE assignee_id = #{userId} AND status IN ('待处理', '处理中') UNION ALL SELECT id FROM defect WHERE assignee_id = #{userId} AND status IN ('新建', '已指派', '修复中') ) AS combined
